content:
All artifacts created. Here's what's in `openspec/changes/admin-audit-log-viewer/`:

| Artifact | What it covers |
|---|---|
| `proposal.md` | Why + scope tied to #338, all decisions confirmed, no open questions |
| `design.md` | 6 decisions: sub-router placement, offset pagination, URL search params, page reset, MongoDB indexes, tier display names |
| `specs/audit-log-list/spec.md` | Given/When/Then scenarios for all 4 requirements (procedure, route, nav link, stub links replacement) + NFAC |
| `tasks.md` | 6 implementation tasks in TDD order, full PR/merge/post-merge workflow |
| `tests.md` | 18 test cases mapped to tasks and spec scenarios (7 procedure unit tests, 6 RTL component tests, 1 stub link test, 4 E2E tests) |

Run `/opsx:apply` to start implementation.
